assertions.assertion: Uses context.Caller to differentiate between token types
assertions.rationale: Does not use context.Caller at all. Instead uses context.RequestedClaimTypes to infer token type indirectly.
Does not reference IdentityServerConstants.ProfileDataCallers or ClaimsProviderIdentityToken anywhere.

assertions.assertion: Emits a minimal claim set (e.g. just name) for identity tokens
assertions.rationale: Does not differentiate by token type — emits claims based on RequestedClaimTypes, not by checking if it's an identity token.

assertions.assertion: Emits a richer claim set for access tokens, using AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
assertions.rationale: Does not use AddRequestedClaims. Uses IssuedClaims.Add directly and does not distinguish access tokens from identity tokens.
